{{nihongo|'''Onga Shrine (Ongahara)'''|遠賀神社（鶴岡市遠賀原）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

{{nihongo|'''Onga Shrine (Ongahara)'''|遠賀神社（鶴岡市遠賀原）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Onga Shrine (Ongahara)'''|遠賀神社（鶴岡市遠賀原）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Onga Shrine (Ongahara)'''|遠賀神社（鶴岡市遠賀原）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Onga Shrine (Ongahara)'''|遠賀神社（鶴岡市遠賀原）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Dewa Province]].
